content:
# Hydrogeochemistry

**Summary**: The study of the chemical composition of groundwater and its interaction with rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] applied hydrogeochemistry to assess reservoir temperature and fluid properties.

- [[1992-hassan|Hassan, 1992]] conducted hydrogeochemistry to determine major ion distribution in the Alat and Khobar aquifers.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] Hydrogeochemistry helps determine the origin and evolution of geothermal fluids.

- [[1992-hassan|Hassan, 1992]] conducted hydrogeochemistry to determine major ion distribution in the Alat and Khobar aquifers.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] Analysis of chemical parameters like Cl-SO4-HCO3 (TCHS) and Cl-Li-B (TCLB).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Suggested that thermal water is affected by water-rock interactions, mixing, and dilution. ([[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023, p. 72]])

- Both aquifers are over-saturated with calcite and dolomite, and under-saturated with gypsum. ([[1992-hassan|Hassan, 1992, p. 1]])
